programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project
programme.desc: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

programme.title: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Lola Versus
programme.desc: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

programme.title: Thank You, Have a Nice Day
programme.desc: A Mexican delivery worker in New York City tries to connect with his daughter while working, and one of the deliveries turns out to be a bitter surprise.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie finds herself alone amid a media meltdown after news of her AI written show is somehow leaked to the public; Val is further shocked to discover that a member of her team has not signed a NDA.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.title: Enigma
programme.desc: An exploration of transgender identity and legacy through the stories of icons April Ashley and Amanda Lear.

programme.title: Night Is Not Eternal
programme.desc: Night Is Not Eternal is a deeply personal exploration of political activism through the eyes of Chinese American filmmaker Nanfu Wang. For over seven years, Nanfu follows Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba. Driven by her own experiences in China, Nanfu is drawn to Rosa's story and the parallels between their homelands. With intimate access, Nanfu follows Rosa's journey from the streets of Havana to rallies and conferences worldwide, capturing her transformation from a grassroots activist to an international public figure and documenting the challenges faced by activists resisting authoritarian regimes.

programme.title: Date Night
programme.desc: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Ex Machina
programme.desc: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: Becoming Warren Buffett
programme.desc: The legendary investor starts out as an ambitious, numbers-obsessed boy from Nebraska and ends up becoming one of the richest and most respected men in the world.

programme.title: Great Photo, Lovely Life
programme.desc: Photojournalist Amanda Mustard turns her investigative lens on sexual abuse committed by her grandfather, beginning a personal journey in pursuit of the truth and reconciliation for her family.

programme.title: Love to Love You, Donna Summer
programme.desc: Donna Summer creates music that takes her from the avant-garde scene in Germany to the glitter and bright lights of dance clubs in New York; features never-before-seen home video footage and interviews with friends, family and colleagues.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

Following a relaxing family vacation in Nantucket, Lois discovers that she has been banned from the Airbnb app due to a poor review citing a stolen object - when everyone else says that they stole nothing, Lois eventually finds out that she mistakenly stole a fancy shampoo bottle. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian discover saltwater taffy on the trip and decide to buy it in bulk and sell it door-to-door back in Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter signs up to take the place of the retiring Pawtucket Brewery's nightwatchman - when a drunk Principal Shepherd bribes him with cash to let him and his fellow principals steal some beer, Peter decides to turn the brewery into an after-hours bar. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian find a lost dog poster with a big cash reward and exploit Brian's similarity to the missing pooch to try to claim the reward.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series about the escapades of Stan Smith, an extreme right-wing CIA agent dealing with family life and keeping America safe in the most absurd way possible. Stan becomes addicted to dying after Roger tricks him into thinking that he had a heart attack, and Klaus takes Steve to Arizona State University for a college visit where a fraternity hazes him.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. Francine steals from the CIA and pretends to be a sexy supervillain in a bid to push Stan into being more seductive, and Roger plans to trap Jay Leno and have his revenge on him.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Frigate Me Knot: Animated comedy. The warship Teddy served on is being decommissioned, but an incident during his tour of duty makes him reluctant to attend its farewell ceremony. [S,AD] S12 Ep13

programme.title: Wycliffe: The Cycle of Death
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the popular West Country detective drama series based on the books by WJ Burley. When a bookshop owner in Penzance is brutally murdered, Wycliffe discovers that all is not well among the members of one of the area's most respected families.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the archaic world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine - was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college? When another two deaths occur and both mirror macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that the motive is much more convoluted...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Gwenda Halliday has never been to England before - when she moves into the house of her dreams, she begins to have ghostly apparitions. On discovering that Gwenda grew up in the house as a child, the mystery takes a more sinister edge as she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed in the house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a British agent comes back to haunt him after a grisly murder in Midsomer Parva. A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University clashes with big business when science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities. But when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a local troublemaker and lothario is found dead in the model village which is the chief tourist attraction of Little Worthy.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a professor of German history who had a fascination with local underground boxing bouts - when they learn that one of his students was the latest winner of one fight, they suspect that the murder may have connections to the underworld.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway are sent upon a seemingly impossible quest when botanist Liv Nash accidentally digs up the body of the recently-buried professor Murray Hawes - Murray was a man possessed and fixated upon solving an impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll, but could his obsession have been dangerous enough to get him killed?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The departure of Dr Dibbs sees Martin move back into his old surgery and agree to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed - determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child and even suggests that Louisa and the baby could move to London with him. Louisa reluctantly agrees to move into the Doc's house and offers to help with reception duties as Pauline has left, but she is none too sure about the move to London as she had hoped to resume her career as headmistress of the village school - meanwhile, Portwenn packs out the village church for the funeral of the Doc's Aunt Joan. As the villagers are shocked when Martin's eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers to the heart of eating the wrong food, Joan's sister Ruth attends the funeral and demonstrates the same cantankerous character as her nephew after learning that she is to inherit Joan's house and farm.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Sleepless nights take their toll on Martin and Louisa as they try to find ways to comfort their constantly wailing baby, and Aunt Ruth deals with an intruder on the farm who has stolen the hubcaps from her car - when the thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley, Ruth decides to pay a visit to the mother and her son. It soon becomes clear to psychiatrist Ruth that Michael is a bit odd as he has a collection of metal objects strewn around the garden - meanwhile, Shirley makes an appointment with Martin to discuss crippling stomach pains that she has been suffering from. When her son is out of the room, Shirley tells the Doc that she thinks that her son is trying to poison her so he can have the house to himself - elsewhere, new receptionist Morwenna Newcross fails to make a good impression by arriving late on her first day, appearing to be hyperactive, and getting sacked when Martin alleges that she is high on drugs.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. When Rosemary and Laura answer a call from Professor James Mullins as he is having problems with an unknown blight on his beloved allotment, the girls find themselves caught up in his fight to stop the land being sold to developers - although he is blind, James is still as sharp as ever and lives a fiercely independent lifestyle with the help of his guide dog Tiberius. After a particularly bitter allotment committee meeting, Rosemary and Laura arrive to take some soil samples but instead find James lying dead in a deep pit - Jangles, a vagrant who lives in a nearby caravan, saw no-one and the police assume that the blind man simply fell. Not believing that it was an accident, Rosemary and Laura stake out the place at night to find the culprit... but instead discover drugs, another death, and dangerous dealings in high finance.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Rosemary and Laura are asked to bring Baffington Churchyard back to its former glory in time for a medieval fair - at its heart is an ancient yew tree which makes Laura feel edgy because it's known as the tree of death. Nearby Brockett's Farm, owned by Marie Sutton, is in high demand - local landowner Franklin Danvers wants to turn it into a medieval agricultural museum, but bidding against him is Redland Linton from herbal remedy company Knussens, who hope to use bark from the farm's extensive yew plantation to produce a natural cure for cancer. When Marie's brother Malcolm bursts into a public meeting after an absence of several years and announces his plans to sell the farm to housing developers, Rosemary and Laura arrive to start work the next morning and find Malcolm killed by an arrow. With a village full of suspects, the pair realise that the killing is as much about unrequited love as land.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Detective drama series following two detectives who seemingly have nothing in common but are thrown together and forge a rumbustious partnership in Bath. In a case of social media versus reality, a lifestyle influencer dies during a routine nose job, leaving McDonald and Dodds to separate the fact from fiction.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A housebreaker known as 'the Creeper' is terrorising the villages, and the latest victim is Chief Constable Richard Lovell. Meanwhile, Jack Filby holds a dinner party at upper-crust Chettham Park House - but the evening proves fatal for one guest. When Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find a group of friends whose ties to a local gangster and the Chief Constable go back to the 1960s. While the detectives try to dig up more information, the burglaries and murders continue - and it looks as though the Creeper knows plenty of secrets that others would rather stayed hidden.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates the case of a four-member syndicate who own a racehorse. Two members are desperate to sell the horse and two are determined to keep it, then one of them is murdered.

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: The first episode of a psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. Pete and Maddie find out that their son Theo was swapped at birth with another boy - will Theo's real parents want him back, or will the couples be able to 'play nice'?

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: Psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. Pete and Maddie begin the fight to keep Theo - not only is it expensive and painful, but the constant dredging up of their past also starts to damage their relationship.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The last episode of the sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector and Jack are the only contestants in a gardening competition.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. Nick appears to be uninterested when there is a spate of petrol thefts in the village, and Blaketon is enraged to discover that he is neglecting his job to spend time with Kate and the baby.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick struggles to combine fatherhood with full-time police work until his mum comes to the rescue. Meanwhile, Greengrass sets up a darts match with high stakes.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Rivalry between traditional film photographers and digital camera fans in the village of Luxton Deeping reaches fever pitch at an annual photographic society exhibition when snapper Steve Bright threatens black and white film enthusiast Lionel Bell - Lionel is then photographing his favourite oak trees when he is strangled with the cord from his light meter. Lionel's diary shows that Barnaby visited him the night he died and a glass with his fingerprints is found... but is he being framed?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Pollard's factory launch descends into chaos. Donald sets his sights on getting Anna and Carl together, while Debbie orchestrates a plan to return the van to the Kings.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donald grows tired of Carl and Anna's arguing and forces the pair to settle their differences. Pollard hires two new workers for the factory, and Daz catches Victoria drunk.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve lies to Michelle saying he got drunk and spent the night at Lloyd's. Tina tells David her dad wants to meet him. She asks him to be on his best behaviour. Jason approaches Becky armed with a bunch of flowers intending to suggest they cool their relationship a bit. He’s bemused when Becky dumps him saying she knows she was too keen and it’s best to call it a day. Lloyd witnesses the whole thing. Joe arrives at the Platts. He grills David about his future and soon realises that although David’s a bit cocky, he obviously cares about Tina. Becky spends the evening in the pub.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Harry puts pressure on Dan to admit Steve didn’t intentionally leave him for dead but Dan’s unrepentant and he’s enjoying making Steve suffer. Liam and Maria arrive back from their holiday all loved up. They agree to try for another baby. Blanche kicks up a fuss about wanting a proper roast dinner. Ken goes to buy a chicken but he gets side-tracked and ends up in the Rovers.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. Strangers in the village become the focus of local hostility amidst reports of a peeping tom, and Nick's mum makes a determined attempt to court Sergeant Blaketon.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series. A young German's arrival stirs up buried resentment, and an eccentric old couple have a wedding anniversary to remember.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of Badger's Drift is disturbed when schoolteacher Connie Bishop screams in fright that she has an intruder. Later, at a meeting of the Frobisher Night committee, Connie clashes with trophy wife Zukie Richardson who wants to make the fundraising event grander with cash from her wealthy husband. When the body of a councillor who also opposed Zukie's plans is found in Connie's garden, the police are called, and DCI Tom Barnaby has another case of murder to deal with. Slimy womaniser Laurence Mann offers to change Connie's locks, but she wakes in the night to find him in the summerhouse with his throat cut. Not wishing to be alone in the cottage, Connie asks shy sculptor Justin Hooper to stay in her spare room - but he awakes to find her sleepwalking and trying to kiss him. When the police arrive, Connie confesses that she may have committed the murders in her sleep, saying she heard voices saying 'kill him'. But is she telling the truth?

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A mysterious phone message leads DCI Banks to Harrogate to search for his estranged younger brother Roy - meanwhile, Banks's team are introduced to DI Helen Morton, who has been drafted to cover Annie's maternity leave, at the scene of the murder of a young woman found in her car. When Banks's name and address are found in the pocket of the victim, Helen speculates that their boss could be a suspect in the case - unaware that his team are searching for him, Banks begins to delve into the life of his brother and soon uncovers questionable business transactions and associates as well as an angry fiancee and an affair. Could Banks's brother be the killer that his team are searching for?

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. While Banks has been searching for his missing younger brother Roy, DI Helen Morton has become convinced that Roy is the prime suspect in the Jennifer Lewis murder - when a body found at Halton quarry turns out to be Roy, Morton has one more murder to solve while Banks must return to his childhood home to inform his parents of the terrible news. When Banks' parents - who are desperate for answers - plead with him to find out what happened to Roy, Banks defies Morton and returns to the station to try and lead the investigation into the murders of Roy and Jennifer. Both are convinced that the answer to the case lies with Carmen, an 'exotic companion' being treated at the Berger-Lennox clinic, and so Banks and Morton agree to put their differences aside to help each other get to the truth.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case in the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. An ailing Foreign Office clerk asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy that an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. Young music teacher Violet Smith tells Holmes of her concerns over a mysterious cyclist who follows her when she rides from the station to her place of work.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. Hornblower sets sail aboard HMS Renown on a dangerous mission to the West Indies, but events under the command of the tyrannical and volatile Captain Sawyer soon force the officers onboard to contemplate mutiny.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. The boys are excited by the prospect of a visit to a home in Iowa which is reportedly brimming with antique items.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. In this episode, Henry takes a glorious ride through the south of France and finds some of the twistiest roads imaginable - once back home, he meets the designers behind Aston Martin's first-ever bike and tells the story of the Suzuki 750, the bike that was nicknamed the Kettle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the opening weekend of the 2026 British Touring Car Championship season from Donington Park. Nicki Shields presents, with race commentary from David Addison and Tim Harvey.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from across the Football League, featuring West Brom v Ipswich, Norwich v Swansea, Sheffield United v Preston and Stoke v Portsmouth. [S]

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Meet a team pumping out paint and luxury wallpaper for the most discerning of DIYers, then learn how a homemade guitar amp changed the course of music history overnight.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Sky Bet Sunday Series
programme.desc: Musselburgh: Oli Bell presents live coverage of the second round of the 2026 Sunday Series from Musselburgh. Richard Hoiles provides the commentary. [S]

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: The 14th entry in the James Bond film series and the last to star Roger Moore as the secret agent. When James Bond is sent to investigate a security leak at high-tech company Zorin Industries, he discovers a hotbed of murder and deception - Max Zorin, the company's mysterious owner has devised a plan to corner the world's microchip market... even if he has to kill millions to do it. Before Bond can stop Zorin, he must confront the madman's beautiful and deadly companion May Day - with help from geologist Stacey Sutton, Bond launches an all-out assault on Zorin's deadly scheme that concludes with a treacherous duel on the upper spans of the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: The 14th entry in the James Bond film series and the last to star Roger Moore as the secret agent. When James Bond is sent to investigate a security leak at high-tech company Zorin Industries, he discovers a hotbed of murder and deception - Max Zorin, the company's mysterious owner has devised a plan to corner the world's microchip market... even if he has to kill millions to do it. Before Bond can stop Zorin, he must confront the madman's beautiful and deadly companion May Day - with help from geologist Stacey Sutton, Bond launches an all-out assault on Zorin's deadly scheme that concludes with a treacherous duel on the upper spans of the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: Thrilling crime action remake of the classic 1974 film The Taking of Pelham One Two Three. Four armed men hijack a subway train in Manhattan one early afternoon in New York City - their leader is called Ryder, and he connects by phone with Walter Garber, a dispatcher who is watching the train's line and who has been temporarily demoted from a supervisor position while being investigated for bribery. Ryder then demands ten million dollars within one hour... or else will start shooting hostages.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: Thrilling crime action remake of the classic 1974 film The Taking of Pelham One Two Three. Four armed men hijack a subway train in Manhattan one early afternoon in New York City - their leader is called Ryder, and he connects by phone with Walter Garber, a dispatcher who is watching the train's line and who has been temporarily demoted from a supervisor position while being investigated for bribery. Ryder then demands ten million dollars within one hour... or else will start shooting hostages.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Crime caper loosely based on the film of the same name. After being double crossed by a club owner with mob connections, a group of friends plans a heist, but an unexpected discovery quickly changes everything.

programme.title: Lost Car Rescue
programme.desc: Reality series following an ambitious team of classic car hunters as they delve deep into Canada's northern wilderness to recover rare vehicles rumoured to be hiding in the bush. In this episode, the car hunters race to save historic vehicles before a mobile crusher moves in to destroy them.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Arthur puts his savings into an old safe in the lock-up, but his nest egg is in danger when an old acquaintance arrives from Marbella.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Solo Flight: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is fired from a case and consoles himself by going on a lone mountain hike, but he ends up getting trapped under a WWII plane. [SL,S,AD] S7 Ep15

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Veteran actor Armand Assante guest stars in this episode of the classic US detective drama. A gang of thieves go after their hidden loot from a robbery a year previously, but matters are complicated when the only member of the gang who knows where it is suddenly dies.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The adventures of suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint is persuaded to follow a defecting civil servant who has been tricked into smuggling secret papers to East Germany.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: A couple who have recently won the pools ask for Ken's help when they receive threatening letters - but Boon finds himself becoming emotionally involved with the lady.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Just four spots remain in the Round of 16 as eight bots fight to the death for the chance of glory and a shot at the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. The private detective spends his 40th birthday helping some local shopkeepers who are having problems with organised gangs.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. When anonymous messages begin turning up informing a model that someone close to her is in danger of being murdered, the communications leave her doubting her own sanity.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Francesca Annis guest stars as suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another adventure. The Saint sets out on the trail of a former Nazi believed to have taken refuge in South America.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken and Harry's close and loyal relationship comes under severe strain when Harry is arrested on suspicion of fraud.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy river to catch the Glyphis shark.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli. [S]

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Bored billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) decides to entertain himself by stealing a Monet from a reputed museum. When Catherine Banning (Rene Russo), an investigator for the museum's insurance company, takes an interest in Crown, a complicated back-and-forth game with romantic undertones begins between them. In an attempt to find out where Banning's loyalties lie, Crown returns the painting and essentially turns himself in, hoping that Banning's feelings for him will lead to an escape.

programme.title: The Mexican
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Jerry Welbach, a reluctant bagman, who has been given two ultimatums: The first is from his mob boss to travel to Mexico and retrieve a priceless antique pistol, known as "the Mexican"... or suffer the consequences. The second is from his girlfriend Samantha (Julia Roberts) to end his association with the mob. Jerry figures alive and in trouble with Samantha is better than the more permanent alternative, so he heads south of the border.

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Chili Palmer (John Travolta) is a Miami mobster who gets sent by his boss, the psychopathic Bones Barboni (Dennis Farina), to collect a bad debt from Harry Zimm (Gene Hackman), a Hollywood producer who specializes in cheesy horror films. When Chili meets Harry's leading lady (Rene Russo), the romantic sparks fly. After pitching his own life story as a movie idea, Chili learns that being a mobster and being a Hollywood producer really aren't all that different.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: While Col. James Braddock (Chuck Norris) was serving in Vietnam, he fell in love with a woman named Lin Tan Cang (Miki Kim). However, he thought her to be dead and returned to the United States without her. Years later, Braddock is told that Lin is alive -- along with her son that he fathered. Acting against a direct order from the CIA, and with the help of a foreign missionary (Yehuda Efroni), he returns to Vietnam to find his family, taking on a communist general (Aki Aleong) along the way.

programme.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
programme.desc: In this D.H. Lawrence adaptation, Sir Clifford Chatterley returns home from war severely injured and impotent, causing tension in his marriage to Lady Constance Chatterley. Clifford gives his young wife permission to seek a lover from the upper classes, but Constance becomes ill from the strain of caring for her husband. A visiting nurse recommends fresh air for her recovery, which leads her into the arms of gamekeeper Oliver Mellors.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: African-American Philadelphia police detective Virgil Tibbs (Sidney Poitier) is arrested on suspicion of murder by Bill Gillespie (Rod Steiger), the racist police chief of tiny Sparta, Mississippi. After Tibbs proves not only his own innocence but that of another man, he joins forces with Gillespie to track down the real killer. Their investigation takes them through every social level of the town, with Tibbs making enemies as well as unlikely friends as he hunts for the truth.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Following the conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan, injured veterans turn to adaptive athletics to heal their physical and emotional battle wounds.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: High school student Cody Banks wants nothing more than what every other teen wants: to survive the banality of adolescence and become an adult. However, Banks is no ordinary teen; he's a CIA agent. When he's not doing his homework, Banks is on the case, spying on fellow student Natalie Connors to get close to her father, a scientist who has invented killer nanobots designed to bring down the country.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments
programme.desc: Enjoying a life of ease in the court of Egypt's pharaoh, Moses (Charlton Heston) discovers his Hebrew heritage and, later, God's expectations of him. He dedicates himself to liberating his people from captivity and -- with the aid of plagues and divine intervention -- manages to lead them out of Egypt and across the Red Sea. A greater challenge comes in the form of the golden calf idol, however, and it takes an unforgettable visitation by God on Mount Sinai for Moses' mission to prevail.

programme.title: Days of Heaven
programme.desc: A screen poem about life in America at the turn of the century. A story of love and murder told through the voice of a child and expressive images of nature in 1916. A steelworker flees Chicago after a fight with his boss; he takes his little sister and girlfriend with him.

programme.title: Leviathan
programme.desc: Hired by Martin (Meg Foster), the head of a major corporation, a crew including geologist Steven Beck (Peter Weller) descends to the ocean's depths for a mining project. When the undersea explorers find a sunken ship and investigate, they inadvertently bring a malevolent life form on board their vessel. The creature kills some crew members and causes them to mutate, resulting in a battle for survival against an unknown force far below the surface of the ocean.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a new world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life before it spirals out of control.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: When New York City comes under attack from an alien invasion, a woman and other survivors try to find a way to safety. They soon learn that they must remain absolutely silent as the mysterious creatures are drawn to the slightest sound.

programme.title: King Kong
programme.desc: When a research ship is sent to explore an island thought to be rich in oil, paleontologist Jack Prescott (Jeff Bridges) sneaks aboard, having heard strange rumors about the island. En route, the crew rescues Dwan (Jessica Lange), the sole survivor of a shipwreck. When they arrive, they find native people living in fear of a monster called Kong. The natives kidnap Dwan and sacrifice her to what turns out to be an enormous ape. Dwan is eventually rescued, and the ape captured for a gala exhibit.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: David Raskin is a high-school science nerd who dreams of going to MIT. When he and his friends find his late father's plans for a "temporal displacement device," David can't wait to start tinkering. When they finally get the device to work, the teenagers jump at the opportunity to manipulate time in their favor -- but their joy is short-lived when they begin to discover the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Divers Sam and Jared love life in the Bahamas. But when friends Bryce and Amanda visit, the couple take them on a treasure-hunting trip, where they discover more than they bargained for, a downed airplane full of cocaine alongside a famous shipwreck. Unknown to Sam and Jared, Bryce makes a fatal mistake and decides to sell the cocaine, which angers a group of drug dealers, who are in hot pursuit of the divers.

programme.title: Curse of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: When legendary Inspector Clouseau (Roger Moore) goes missing, New York police officer Clifton Sleigh (Ted Wass) is enlisted to find him. But Sleigh turns out to be the only detective in the world more incompetent than Clouseau himself. Traveling to France, Sleigh bumbles his way into and out of trouble, while encountering a number of characters from Clouseau's past, including the charismatic jewel thief Charles Litton (David Niven) and his womanizing nephew, George (Robert Wagner).

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: A gentle Jewish-Italian waiter, Guido Orefice (Roberto Benigni), meets Dora (Nicoletta Braschi), a pretty schoolteacher, and wins her over with his charm and humor. Eventually they marry and have a son, Giosue (Giorgio Cantarini). Their happiness is abruptly halted, however, when Guido and Giosue are separated from Dora and taken to a concentration camp. Determined to shelter his son from the horrors of his surroundings, Guido convinces Giosue that their time in the camp is merely a game.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
programme.desc: Hoping to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs, SpongeBob follows a mysterious, swashbuckling ghost pirate known as the Flying Dutchman on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Exodus
programme.desc: Based on Leon Uris' novel, this historical epic provides a dramatic backstory to the creation of the state of Israel in 1948, in the aftermath of World War II. Ari Ben Canaan, a passionate member of the Jewish paramilitary group Haganah, attempts to transport 600 Jewish refugees on a dangerous voyage from Cyprus to Palestine on a ship named the Exodus. He faces obstruction from British forces, who will not grant the ship passage to its destination.

programme.title: Soapdish
programme.desc: Celeste Talbert (Sally Field) is the star of the long-running soap opera The Sun Also Sets. With the show's ratings down, Celeste's ruthlessly ambitious co-star, Montana Moorehead (Cathy Moriarty), and the show's arrogant producer, David Seton Barnes (Robert Downey Jr.), plot to aggravate her into leaving the show by bringing back her old flame, Jeffrey Anderson (Kevin Kline), and hiring her beautiful young niece, Lori Craven (Elisabeth Shue).

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But there is one thing stopping him (Matthew Davis) from proposing: She is too blond. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) journeys to Washington, D.C., to have her say about animal rights, but is ignored by every politician she encounters and quickly learns that the White House can be even tougher to navigate than the Ivy League. Finally, Elle makes the acquaintance of sympathetic Rep. Victoria Rudd (Sally Field), who helps the young lawyer get her foot in the door of Congress. Unfortunately, Elle still has to convince the entire legislature to hear her out.

programme.title: When Harry Met Sally...
programme.desc: In 1977, college graduates Harry Burns (Billy Crystal) and Sally Albright (Meg Ryan) share a contentious car ride from Chicago to New York, during which they argue about whether men and women can ever truly be strictly platonic friends. Ten years later, Harry and Sally meet again at a bookstore, and in the company of their respective best friends, Jess (Bruno Kirby) and Marie (Carrie Fisher), attempt to stay friends without sex becoming an issue between them.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: 48 HRS.
programme.desc: Renegade cop Jack Cates (Nick Nolte) pulls bank robber Reggie Hammond (Eddie Murphy) from a federal prison on a 48-hour leave to help him capture Hammond's old partner, Albert Ganz (James Remar). Having escaped from a prison work crew, Ganz is on a killing spree around San Francisco, on the trail of half a million dollars that went missing after one of his robberies. The cocky Reggie knows where the money is, but spars with the hotheaded Jack as he enjoys his temporary freedom.

programme.title: A Night at the Roxbury
programme.desc: Despite being well into adulthood, brothers Doug and Steve Butabi still live at home and work in the flower shop owned by their dad. They exist only to hit on women at discos, though they're routinely unsuccessful until a chance run-in with Richard Grieco gets them inside the swank Roxbury club. Mistaken for high rollers, they meet their dream women, Vivica and Cambi, and resolve to open a club of their own.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Father and stepfather Dusty and Brad join forces to make Christmastime perfect for the children. Their newfound partnership soon gets put to the test when Dusty's old-school, macho dad and Brad's gentle father arrive to turn the holiday upside down. After a sudden change in plans, the four men decide to take the kids to a luxury resort for a fun-filled getaway that turns into a hilariously chaotic adventure.

programme.title: Posse
programme.desc: In Cuba, a band of Buffalo Soldiers, led by the intrepid Jesse Lee (Mario Van Peebles) and joined by a gambling white soldier (Stephen Baldwin), is sent on a suicide mission to intercept a shipment of gold from enemy troops during the Spanish-American War. When they discover that the racist white officer who sent them, Col. Graham (Billy Zane), meant to betray them, they are forced to shoot their way to freedom. Upon escaping, they embark on a dangerous quest across the American frontier.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A.
programme.desc: When his longtime partner on the force is killed, reckless U.S. Secret Service agent Richard Chance (William L. Petersen) vows revenge, setting out to nab dangerous counterfeit artist Eric Masters (Willem Dafoe). Along with his new, straitlaced partner, John Vukovich (John Pankow), Chance sets up a scheme to entrap Masters, resulting in the accidental death of an undercover officer. As Chance's desire for justice becomes an obsession, Vukovich questions the lawless methods he employs.

programme.title: The Burning
programme.desc: At summer camp, some teenagers pull a prank on the camp's caretaker, Cropsy (Lou David). But the joke goes terribly wrong, and the teens leave Cropsy for dead after setting him on fire. But no one keeps Cropsy down. A few years later, the burned and disfigured caretaker returns to camp equipped with his trusty shears, ready to unleash his particular brand of vengeance on a whole new group of teens. The murderous Cropsy stalks the campers in the woods, one by one.

programme.title: Vertigo
programme.desc: Hitchcock's romantic story of obsession, manipulation and fear. A detective is forced to retire after his fear of heights causes the death of a fellow officer and the girl he was hired to follow. He sees a double of the girl, causing him to transform her image onto the dead girl's body. This leads into a cycle of madness and lies.

programme.title: There's Something Wrong With the Children
programme.desc: Margaret and Ben take a weekend trip with two longtime friends and their two young children. Ben soon suspects something sinister is afoot when the kids start behaving strangely after disappearing into the woods overnight.

programme.title: The Dogs of War
programme.desc: Mercenary soldiers Jamie (Christopher Walken) and Drew (Tom Berenger) are hired by a large corporation to liberate Zangaro, a small African nation, from an iron-fisted despot. Once there, Jamie ends up in jail. After being brutally tortured, he is helped by Dr. Okoye (Winston Ntshona), a political prisoner, and learns more about the plight of the country's people. After Jamie is freed, he becomes disillusioned with his wealthy employers and joins the Zangaro people on the revolutionary front.

programme.title: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Frank Morris (Clint Eastwood), a hardened con with a history of prison breaks, is sent to serve the rest of his life sentence at Alcatraz -- America's most infamously brutal and inescapable maximum security prison. Morris quickly realizes the prison's dehumanizing effects and clashes with its cruel warden (Patrick McGoohan). Fed up with life at Alcatraz, Morris and two convict brothers (Fred Ward, Jack Thibeau) meticulously plan the unthinkable: an escape from the island.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Divers Sam and Jared love life in the Bahamas. But when friends Bryce and Amanda visit, the couple take them on a treasure-hunting trip, where they discover more than they bargained for, a downed airplane full of cocaine alongside a famous shipwreck. Unknown to Sam and Jared, Bryce makes a fatal mistake and decides to sell the cocaine, which angers a group of drug dealers, who are in hot pursuit of the divers.

programme.title: The Hunted
programme.desc: "The Hunted" is a suspense thriller about a tracker, Bonham (Tommy Lee Jones), who teams up with FBI agent Abby Durrell (Connie Nielsen) to hunt down a trained assassin Hallam (Benicio del Toro). With precision and skill, the predator remains one step ahead, and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: In an alternate 1980s, the United States stands alone as communism grows stronger. When Soviet soldiers invade a small Colorado town, brothers Jed and Matt Eckert escape with friends to the forest. With their father, Tom, a prisoner of the invading army, the children decide to fight against the Soviets. As the country comes under increasing attack, the group teams up with Lt. Col. Andrew Tanner to take back their town.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: When North Korean troops invade U.S. soil and take over the city of Spokane, Wash., a recently returned Iraq War veteran and a group of teens flee to the woods and form a band of freedom fighters. Dubbing themselves the Wolverines, the youths launch guerrilla attacks against the invaders, but how long they can sustain the fight in the face of the enemy's superior numbers and firepower remains in question.

programme.title: Navy SEALS
programme.desc: Navy special operations forces go to the Middle East to free a helicopter crew taken captive by terrorist Ben Shaheed (Nicholas Kadi). After learning that Shaheed has killed a hostage and acquired missiles on the black market, Lt. James Curran (Michael Biehn) and Lt. Dale Hawkins (Charlie Sheen) consult with a reporter who is an expert on Shaheed and his motives. As Shaheed embarks on his plan to violently derail regional treaty talks, the special operations forces make their move.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant dystopian future, when man's most precious resource -- oil -- has been depleted and the world plunged into war, famine and financial chaos, the last vestiges of the law in Australia attempt to restrain a vicious biker gang. Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant dystopian future, when man's most precious resource -- oil -- has been depleted and the world plunged into war, famine and financial chaos, the last vestiges of the law in Australia attempt to restrain a vicious biker gang. Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.
