Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant dystopian future, when man's most precious resource -- oil -- has been depleted and the world plunged into war, famine and financial chaos, the last vestiges of the law in Australia attempt to restrain a vicious biker gang. Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant dystopian future, when man's most precious resource -- oil -- has been depleted and the world plunged into war, famine and financial chaos, the last vestiges of the law in Australia attempt to restrain a vicious biker gang. Max (Mel Gibson), an officer with the Main Force Patrol, launches a personal vendetta against the gang when his wife (Joanne Samuel) and son are hunted down and murdered, leaving him with nothing but the instincts for survival and retribution.

programme.title: The Town That Dreaded Sundown
programme.desc: A masked maniac terrorizes the same small community where a murderer known as the Phantom Killer struck decades earlier.

programme.title: The Poughkeepsie Tapes
programme.desc: Hundreds of videotapes of torture, murder and dismemberment show a killer's decadelong reign of terror.

programme.title: The Woods
programme.desc: A tormented teen (Agnes Bruckner) has terrifying visions, while her classmates at a remote boarding-school for girls go missing.

programme.title: Lord of Illusions
programme.desc: Private eye Harry D'Amour (Scott Bakula) travels to Los Angeles and meets with a new client, Dorothea Swann (Famke Janssen). Swann reveals that she and her husband -- famed magician Philip Swann (Kevin J. O'Connor) -- have been targeted by a religious cult experimenting with reincarnation. After Philip dies on stage in the midst of a dangerous trick, D'Amour must struggle to protect Dorothea from the ruthless cult members and their newly reanimated religious leader, Nix (Daniel Von Bargen).

programme.title: The Incredible Melting Man
programme.desc: An astronaut is transformed into a murderous gelatinous mass after returning from an ill-fated space voyage.

programme.title: Reptilicus
programme.desc: Copenhagen is terrorized by a prehistoric beast that has regenerated itself from a recently discovered tail segment.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes (Peter Cushing) and Doctor Watson (Andre Morell) meet with a certain Dr. Mortimer (Francis De Wolff), who tells them of the legend of the "hound," born out of a murder committed by Sir Hugo Baskerville centuries ago. Explaining that Sir Charles Baskerville recently died in the same location as Sir Hugo, Mortimer expresses his deep concern that Sir Henry, the heir to the Baskerville estate, will also fall prey to the evil hound's curse. Holmes sets out to investigate.

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate
programme.desc: Young Vivian (Agnes Bruckner) has a secret: She is a werewolf and has spent her entire life concealing it. She faces divided loyalties when she finds love with a human male named Aiden (Hugh Dancy), much to the disapproval of some of her fellow packmates, especially Gabriel (Olivier Martinez), who also desires her. But Aiden may no longer love her when she reveals her inner wolf.

programme.title: Ghoulies
programme.desc: As a child, Jonathan (Peter Liapis) was almost killed by his father, Malcolm (Michael Des Barres), during a satanic ritual. After being saved and raised by Wolfgang (Jack Nance), who has kept him unaware of his background, Jonathan inherits Malcolm's house and moves in with girlfriend Rebecca (Lisa Pelikan). During a party, he jokingly performs a ceremony described in one of his father's books on black magic, not realizing he has unleashed small, demonic creatures known as "Ghoulies.".

programme.title: Ghoulies II
programme.desc: Pint-sized monsters known as ghoulies hop aboard a traveling carnival, where their violent behavior and grotesque looks are most likely to go unnoticed. There, the gremlin-like creatures find a new home in a haunted house attraction. As the creatures earn their keep by scaring visitors, the carnival finds itself running in the black for the first time in years. But things quickly turn sour when, to the shock of carny Uncle Ned (Royal Dano), the ghoulies start taking bites out of the customers.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: Gunned down by Detective Mike Norris (Chris Sarandon), dying murderer Charles Lee Ray (Brad Dourif) uses black magic to put his soul inside a doll named Chucky -- which Karen Barclay (Catherine Hicks) then buys for her young son, Andy (Alex Vincent). When Chucky kills Andy's baby sitter, the boy realizes the doll is alive and tries to warn people, but he's institutionalized. Now Karen must convince the detective of the murderous doll's intentions, before Andy becomes Chucky's next victim.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: In this chilling adaptation of Stephen King's horror novel, withdrawn and sensitive teen Carrie White (Sissy Spacek) faces taunting from classmates at school and abuse from her fanatically pious mother (Piper Laurie) at home. When strange occurrences start happening around Carrie, she begins to suspect that she has supernatural powers. Invited to the prom by the empathetic Tommy Ross (William Katt), Carrie tries to let her guard down, but things eventually take a dark and violent turn.

programme.title: The Rage: Carrie 2
programme.desc: When her closest friend commits suicide after being manipulated by the popular crowd, quiet and bookish Rachel Lang (Emily Bergl) decides to get back at the guilty parties. Although Rachel falls for sensitive football player Jesse Ryan (Jason London), she remains determined to punish his callous friends. When Rachel discovers that she has superhuman abilities, it ups the stakes for her revenge, echoing a supernatural incident that occurred decades before.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: High school can be tough for many teenagers, but for Carrie White (Chloë Grace Moretz), it's especially hellish. A shy and awkward teen being raised by a religious zealot (Julianne Moore), Carrie is frequently the target of bullies. But Carrie has a secret talent: She can make things move with her mind. One fateful night, an especially cruel prank at her senior prom pushes her over the edge, and Carrie unleashes her telekinetic powers on all who get in her way.

programme.title: The Amityville Horror
programme.desc: When George Lutz (Ryan Reynolds) and his wife, Kathy (Melissa George), find a beautiful new house in the small town of Amityville, N.Y., they think the place is too good to be true. After they move in with their kids, they find out the cheap price tag is thanks to the house's sordid history: The former tenant murdered his family after supposedly being possessed by the devil. Believing the home is haunted, the couple find a priest (Philip Baker Hall) to help them rid the place of evil spirits.

programme.title: Disturbing Behavior
programme.desc: Steve Clark (James Marsden) is a newcomer in the town of Cradle Bay, and he quickly realizes that there's something odd about his high school classmates. The clique known as the Blue Ribbons are the eerie embodiment of academic excellence and clean living. But, like the rest of the town, they're a little too perfect. When Steve's rebellious friend Gavin (Nick Stahl) mysteriously joins their ranks, Steve searches for the truth with fellow misfit Rachel (Katie Holmes).

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: When government scientist Xavier Fitch (Ben Kingsley) intercepts a space transmission containing the genetic sequence for an alien life form, he uses it to produce "Sil" (Natasha Henstridge) -- a gorgeous alien-human hybrid. As Fitch's team grows concerned at her rapid rate of growth, Sil wrecks the laboratory and begins a violent quest for a suitable male human to impregnate her. The U.S. government dispatches top assassin Preston Lennox (Michael Madsen) and a team of experts to stop her.

programme.title: Species II
programme.desc: Having just returned from a mission to Mars, Commander Ross (Justin Lazard) isn't exactly himself. He's slowly becoming a terrifying alien entity with one goal -- to procreate with human women! When countless women suffer gruesome deaths after bearing half-alien offspring, scientist Laura Baker (Marg Helgenberger) and hired assassin Press Lennox (Michael Madsen) use Eve (Natasha Henstridge), a more tempered alien clone, to find Ross and his brood. Before long Eve escapes to mate with Ross.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side
programme.desc: The Freelings have escaped their haunted house, which is now being studied by paranormal investigators, including shaman Taylor (Will Sampson). When Taylor realizes that the Beast, masquerading as the Rev. Kane (Julian Beck), knows where young Carol Anne Freeling (Heather O'Rourke) now lives, he goes to warn the family that their daughter is in danger again. To protect Carol, her father, Steve (Craig T. Nelson), and the rest of the family must plot to take down the Beast.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: Psychically attuned youngster Carol Anne (Heather O'Rourke) is sent to live in Chicago with her Uncle Bruce (Tom Skerritt) and Aunt Pat (Nancy Allen). But that doesn't mean that she's escaped the apparitions that have haunted her in the past. When she starts experiencing terrifying visions, her school psychologist believes that they're figments of her imagination. But this becomes hard to believe when ghostly foes start inhabiting the mirrors in her relatives' high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Count Yorga, Vampire
programme.desc: Weeks after her mother dies, Donna (Donna Anders) and her boyfriend, Michael (Michael Macready), invite Bulgarian émigré Count Yorga (Robert Quarry) to conduct what turns out to be a failed séance. Donna's friends Erica (Judith Lang) and Paul (Michael Murphy) give the count a ride back to his estate and are attacked while leaving. The next day, Erica visits blood specialist Dr. Jim Hayes (Roger Perry), who finds bite marks on her neck and concludes that Yorga is a vampire and must be stopped.

programme.title: The Return of Count Yorga
programme.desc: A San Francisco orphanage becomes the site of strange disappearances when a vampire moves into the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Crimson Cult
programme.desc: A man stops at a lodge, where he meets a professor of witchcraft (Boris Karloff) and dreams of a green-faced witch (Barbara Steele).

programme.title: The Dunwich Horror
programme.desc: Dr. Henry Armitage (Ed Begley), an expert in the occult, goes to the old Whateley manor in Dunwich looking for Nancy Wagner (Sandra Dee), a student who went missing the previous night. He and Elizabeth, a friend and classmate of Nancy's, are turned away by Wilbur (Dean Stockwell), the family's insidious heir, who has plans for the young girl. But Armitage won't be deterred. Through conversations with the locals, he soon unearths the Whateleys' darkest secret -- as well as a great evil.

programme.title: From Beyond
programme.desc: Obsessive scientist Dr. Pretorius (Ted Sorel) successfully discovers a way to access a parallel universe of pleasure by tapping into the brain's pineal gland. When he is seemingly killed by forces from this other dimension, his assistant, Dr. Crawford Tillinghast (Jeffrey Combs), is accused of the murder. After psychiatrist Katherine McMichaels (Barbara Crampton) and detective Bubba Brownlee (Ken Foree) take the case, the trio risks a return to the other world in order to solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Dark Half
programme.desc: Thad Beaumont (Timothy Hutton) has had success writing novels under both his real name and his pseudonym, George Stark, which he uses to publish base thrillers. When word gets out that they are one and the same, the author holds a mock funeral for Stark. But after a rash of murders eerily similar to those in the Stark books, Thad and his wife, Liz (Amy Madigan), realize that Stark is real and responsible, and must work with local Sheriff Pangborn (Michael Rooker) to stop him.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A young woman with no strong religious beliefs, Frankie Paige (Patricia Arquette) begins having strange and violent experiences, showing signs of the wounds that Jesus received when crucified. When the Vatican gets word of Frankie's situation, a high-ranking cardinal (Jonathan Pryce) requests that the Rev. Andrew Kiernan (Gabriel Byrne) investigate her case. Soon Kiernan realizes that very sinister forces are at work, and tries to rescue Frankie from the entity that is plaguing her.

programme.title: The Return of the Living Dead
programme.desc: When foreman Frank (James Karen) shows new employee Freddy (Thom Mathews) a secret military experiment in a supply warehouse, the two klutzes accidentally release a gas that reanimates corpses into flesh-eating zombies. As the epidemic spreads throughout Louisville, Ky., and the creatures satisfy their hunger in gory and outlandish ways, Frank and Freddy fight to survive with the help of their boss (Clu Gulager) and a mysterious mortician (Don Calfa).

programme.title: Sugar Hill
programme.desc: When nightclub owner Langston (Larry D. Johnson) refuses to sell out to local mob boss Morgan (Robert Quarry), he is beaten to death by a gang of hired thugs. His grief-stricken fiancee, Diana "Sugar" Hill (Marki Bey), vows revenge for his murder and turns to aged voodoo authority Mama Maitresse (Zara Cully). Together they conjure up the demonic spirit of Baron Samedi (Don Pedro Colley), who agrees to help Sugar. He raises an army of zombies and sets them upon Langston's killers.

programme.title: The Video Dead
programme.desc: Ghouls from the movie "Zombie Blood Nightmare" emerge from a brother (Rocky Duvall) and sister's (Roxanna Augesen) TV.

programme.title: The Incredible Melting Man
programme.desc: An astronaut is transformed into a murderous gelatinous mass after returning from an ill-fated space voyage.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Driving near a small Mississippi town in 1964, newlyweds Eli (Ronny Cox) and Caroline (Bibi Besch) experience car trouble. When Eli goes off to look for help, Caroline gets raped and is made pregnant by a horrible creature. Years later the child, now teenager Michael (Paul Clemens), finds himself undergoing an inexplicable physical change that compels him to return to that area in Mississippi. Soon dead bodies start piling up while his desperate parents struggle to understand what's happening.

programme.title: American Gothic
programme.desc: Ma (Yvonne De Carlo), Pa (Rod Steiger) and their backwoods brood show stranded teens some hospitality, then kill them.

programme.title: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Vincent Smith (Rory Calhoun) and his sister Ida (Nancy Parsons) run a rural hotel, but they earn most of their cash operating a food stand that specializes in world-famous sausages. After years of success, however, the duo's upstanding brother, Sheriff Bruce (Paul Linke), eventually discovers the grotesque details of his siblings' booming business: Vincent and Ida are actually plumping up their hotel patrons, killing and dismembering them and then grinding them into frankfurters.

programme.title: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: Struggling actress Katie McGovern (Mary Steenburgen) is approached by the mysterious Mr. Murray (Roddy McDowall) and invited to an upstate New York mansion to film a screen test. There she meets Dr. Joseph Lewis (Jan Rubes), who is eager to hire Katie as a replacement for an actress who's suffered a nervous breakdown. But the film shoot takes a sordid turn as Katie begins to understand that her role is simply a pawn in Lewis' twisted blackmail games.

programme.title: Blacula
programme.desc: During a visit to Transylvania, an African prince (William Marshall) gets turned into a vampire by Count Dracula (Charles Macaulay). Sealed in a coffin for several lifetimes, "Blacula" reawakens in the 1970s Los Angeles. Leaving a trail of bloodless victims in his wake, he pursues Lina (Vonetta McGee), a woman who bears a striking resemblance to his dead wife. Meanwhile, Dr. Gordon Thomas (Thalmus Rasulala) and top cop Lt. Peters (Gordon Pinsent) are hot on the bloodsucker's trail.

programme.title: Scream Blacula Scream
programme.desc: When a hated rival, Lisa Fortier (Pam Grier), is chosen to lead the voodoo cult of Willis Daniels' (Richard Lawson) late mother, a vengeful Willis brings the doomed vampire Prince Mamuwalde (William Marshall) back to life. Willis soon finds the vampire too powerful to control, and Lisa agrees to perform a spell that will break the curse placed on the prince. But, when racist sheriff Dunlop (Michael Conrad) gets involved, the vampire unleashes his deadly revenge.

programme.title: J.D.'s Revenge
programme.desc: Although notorious New Orleans gangster J.D. Walker (David McKnight) is shot and killed in the 1940s, his spirit remains restless for three decades, until a hypnotist's supernatural nightclub act allows him to take over the body of Isaac (Glynn Turman), a mild-mannered law student. After inhabiting Isaac, Walker decides to hunt down the Rev. Elija Bliss (Louis Gossett Jr.), a former criminal who helped the authorities find and assassinate the mobster years ago.

programme.title: Troll
programme.desc: When an ancient troll is awakened in a Norwegian mountain, a ragtag group of heroes must come together to try and stop it from wreaking deadly havoc.

programme.title: Troll 2
programme.desc: When young Joshua (Michael Stephenson) learns that he will be going on vacation with his family to a small town called Nilbog, he protests adamantly. He is warned by the spirit of his deceased grandfather that goblins populate the town. His parents, Michael (George Hardy) and Diana (Margo Prey), dismiss his apprehensions, but soon learn to appreciate their son's warnings. Guided by his grandfather's ghost, will Joshua and his family stand a chance in fighting off these evil beings?

programme.title: The Glory Guys
programme.desc: Inspired by the Battle of the Little Bighorn, this Western follows a selfish military leader, Gen. Frederick McCabe (Andrew Duggan), who unfeelingly throws his soldiers into dangerous battle situations, and the soldiers who must follow his orders. While waiting to be sent into combat, two of the men -- Harrod (Tom Tryon) and Rogers (Harve Presnell) -- find themselves in the midst of a love triangle as they both pursue the heart of the beautiful Lou Woddard (Senta Berger).

programme.title: The Long Riders
programme.desc: During a bank robbery by the legendary James-Younger Gang, Ed Miller (Dennis Quaid) impulsively kills a man, much to the displeasure of leader Jesse James (James Keach), who insists that the gang scatter until the heat is off. The groups of brothers go their separate ways, with Cole Younger (David Carradine) considering settling down with his feisty girlfriend, Belle Starr (Pamela Reed). But they soon regroup for an ill-fated bank job in Northfield, Minn., that results in an epic chase.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Brandt Ruger (Gene Hackman) is a rich cattle rancher. He has a bad relationship with his wife, Melissa (Candice Bergen), whom he treats like a possession. While Brandt is away from home on a hunting trip, Frank Calder (Oliver Reed), a brazen outlaw, kidnaps Melissa and holds her for ransom. Frank, however, treats Melissa better than her own husband does, and before long she begins to develop feelings for him. When Brandt returns, he's enraged and vows to take violent revenge against Frank.

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: Gunfighter Wild Bill Hickok (Jeff Bridges) travels the frontier, gaining fame and enemies in roughly equal measure. He sometimes meets up with his friend and occasional lover, Calamity Jane (Ellen Barkin), and he headlines for a while in a traveling circus. Along the way, he meets Susannah (Diane Lane), his one true love, but spurns her for the outlaw life. With his health deteriorating, Bill rides into Deadwood, S.D., as his past catches up to him.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: When an aging Wild Bill Hickok (Charles Bronson) finds his dreams invaded by the image of a rampaging white buffalo, he decides the only remedy is to find and kill the creature. With the help of his old friend Charlie (Jack Warden), he sets out across the snowy plains, unaware that he's not the only one looking for the fabled beast. Sioux Chief Crazy Horse (Will Sampson) has recently lost a daughter to the white buffalo, and he fears the girl's soul won't rest until he kills it.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Bank robber Graham Dorsey spends a few hours with beautiful widow Amanda Starbuck, in which time his gang takes part in a disastrous holdup. Learning of his comrades' demise, Dorsey goes on the lam. Believing her short-term lover was killed by the law, Amanda decides to make the most of having had a liaison with the supposedly deceased desperado by writing a book about him. Much to his confusion, the still-living Dorsey watches as his name becomes legendary.

programme.title: Alias Jesse James
programme.desc: Foolish life insurance salesman Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) commits his biggest blunder yet when he unwittingly offers a six-figure policy to notorious gunslinger Jesse James (Wendell Corey). Furious, his boss orders him to repurchase the policy. James, however, parries Farnsworth's attempts with ease, robbing and humiliating him. But when James' latest scheme pairs the patsy with the bandit's sweetheart, Cora Lee Collins (Rhonda Fleming), Farnsworth and Cora begin falling in love.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: A group of thieves rob a safe of $100,000 and plan to use the money to purchase some land near a proposed railway line. The crooks think they've gotten away with their crime, but they haven't figured on Sabata (Lee Van Cleef), a violent bounty hunter with no scruples and a strong desire for cash. He teams up with both his partner, Banjo (William Berger), and a local bandit named Carrincha (Pedro Sanchez). Sabata's fast draw and quick wits make life hell for the thieves.

programme.title: Adios Sabata
programme.desc: Gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) allies himself with a group of wily Mexican revolutionaries scheming to overthrow Emperor Maximilian and expel the occupying Austrians from their homeland. Part of their plan involves stealing a shipment of gold and using it to purchase artillery. It won't be easy, however, as the gold is under the protection of the corrupt and sadistic Col. Skimmel (Gerard Herter). As Sabata pulls off the daring heist, he must take on dozens of enraged Austrian forces.

programme.title: The Return of Sabata
programme.desc: The third in a trilogy about the eponymous lone gunman, this one finds Sabata (Lee Van Cleef) working as a sharpshooter for a circus that's just stopped in an ailing one-horse town. The circus gig is only a front, however: Sabata is actually on the verge of robbing town mayor Joe McIntock (Giampiero Albertini). The mayor's been levying heavy taxes as part of a complex plan to defraud the community, but Sabata manages to rip him off first, only to discover that the money is counterfeit.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars
programme.desc: Wandering gunfighter Joe arrives in the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among sheriff John Baxter and the three Rojo brothers. When a regiment of Mexican soldiers bearing gold is waylaid by the Rojo brothers, Joe is hired by Esteban to join the gang, but he plays one side against the other.

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More
programme.desc: In the Wild West, a murderous outlaw known as El Indio and his gang are terrorizing and robbing the citizens of the region. With a bounty on El Indio's head, two bounty hunters, Monco and Col. Douglas Mortimer, come to collect the prize. Upon their first meeting, the two men view each other as rivals, but they eventually agree to become partners in their mutual pursuit of the vicious criminal.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: In the Southwest during the Civil War, a mysterious stranger, Joe (Clint Eastwood), and a Mexican outlaw, Tuco (Eli Wallach), form an uneasy partnership -- Joe turns in the bandit for the reward money, then rescues him just as he is being hanged. When Joe's shot at the noose goes awry during one escapade, a furious Tuco tries to have him murdered. The men re-team abruptly, however, to beat out a sadistic criminal and the Union army and find $20,000 that a soldier has buried in the desert.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dynamite
programme.desc: At the beginning of the Mexican Revolution in 1913, greedy bandit Juan Miranda and idealist John H. Mallory, an Irish Republican Army explosives expert on the lam from the British, fall in with a band of revolutionaries plotting to strike a national bank. When it turns out that the government has been using the bank as a hiding place for illegally detained political prisoners, who are freed by the blast, Miranda becomes a revolutionary hero against his will.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: Having witnessed the brutal murder of his entire family by bandits at the age of 5, Bill Meceita has spent 15 years planning his vengeance. Finding a kindred spirit in Ryan, an experienced gunslinger seeking his own revenge on those who framed him, the two team up to find and kill Walcott, a fearsome bandit on the loose. But Bill soon discovers that Ryan may know more about his tragic past than he has let on.

programme.title: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Harvard graduate James Averill (Kris Kristofferson) is the sheriff of prosperous Jackson County, Wyo., when a battle erupts between the area's poverty-stricken immigrants and its wealthy cattle farmers. The politically connected ranch owners fight the immigrants with the help of Nathan Champion (Christopher Walken), a mercenary competing with Averill for the love of local madam Ella Watson (Isabelle Huppert). As the struggle escalates, Averill and Champion begin to question their decisions.

programme.title: Cast a Long Shadow
programme.desc: Chip (John Dehner), a ranch foreman, approaches aimless hard-drinker Matt Brown (Audie Murphy) in a New Mexico bar. The owner of Chip's ranch has died and left Matt his land, thinking the troubled drifter may be his long-estranged son. Initially, Matt plans on selling the ranch, but then decides to keep it, hoping to impress his ex-lover, Janet (Terry Moore). The ranch, however, turns out to be in foreclosure, forcing Matt and Chip to come up with a plan to pay off their debt to the bank.

programme.title: Terror in a Texas Town
programme.desc: When Swedish-American whaler George Hanson (Sterling Hayden) returns to his Texas hometown after 20 years at sea, he's shocked to learn that his father was murdered just two days prior. The feckless local sheriff (Tyler McVey) won't do anything about it, so George investigates on his own and discovers that an oil speculator (Sebastian Cabot) had his father killed for refusing to sell his land at an unfair price. Enraged, and armed only with a speargun, George goes looking for justice.

programme.title: Man From Del Rio
programme.desc: Thanks to his prowess with a gun, Dave Robles (Anthony Quinn) makes a place for himself in Mesa, becoming sheriff after out-dueling several gunfighters in a single day. But Robles, a Mexican, seethes over the town's racism, and is warned by kindly nurse Estella (Katy Jurado) that without his gun, he would not last very long. That theory is put to the test when the new sheriff injures his wrist fighting with Ed Bannister (Peter Whitney), who upon learning about it, challenges Robles to a duel.

programme.title: Day of the Outlaw
programme.desc: In the quiet frontier town of Bitters, Wyo., a dispute between cattleman Blaise Starrett and farmer Hal Crane is about to boil over into a bloody feud. But the fighting takes a back seat to a new threat when a rogue cavalry captain, Jack Bruhn, rides into town with his band of thugs. Now, with the citizens of Bitters held hostage by Bruhn and his men, Starrett must somehow rescue his town and restore his broken reputation.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: A small-scale gold rush erupts in a Colorado town after treasure is found in a grave. The area quickly becomes a magnet for criminals and other ne'er-do-wells, but everyone is too intent on searching for gold to consider law and order. When Jason McCullough (James Garner), a clever and supremely laid-back gunslinger, wanders into town, he becomes the de facto lawman, aided by local eccentric Jake (Jack Elam). McCullough's ingenuity is tested, however, when he runs afoul of the tough Danby gang.

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: When traveling con man Latigo Smith (James Garner) drifts into a small Western town, he decides to take advantage of a local rivalry between gold-mining factions. Recruiting the shifty Jug May (Jack Elam) to pose as a notorious gunfighter, Smith sets his scheme in motion, while also taking time to romance the lovely Patience Barton (Suzanne Pleshette). However, after his ruse is uncovered, Smith incurs the wrath of the real hired gun, among others, leading to a big shoot-out.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: Looking to mine for gold, greedy industrialist Bartholomew Bogue seizes control of the Old West town of Rose Creek. With their lives in jeopardy, Emma Cullen and other desperate residents turn to bounty hunter Sam Chisholm for help. Chisholm recruits an eclectic group of gunslingers to take on Bogue and his ruthless henchmen. With a deadly showdown on the horizon, the seven mercenaries soon find themselves fighting for more than just money once the bullets start to fly.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: The residents of a Mexican village are intimidated by deranged rancher Lorca (Emilio Fernández), who assembles 50 gunmen to force the townspeople to construct a church in honor of his dead sons. Vigilante Chico (Julian Mateos), who previously teamed up with six other sharpshooters to protect the villagers in a time of need, learns of Lorca's harassment and decides to round up the old gang members, including Chris (Yul Brynner) and Vin (Robert Fuller), and ride in to save the town again.

programme.title: Guns of the Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: When Quintero (Fernando Rey), a Mexican revolutionary leader, is left to rot in jail by the forces of President Diaz, it's up to his subordinate, Max (Reni Santoni), to bust him out. With $600 in hand, he crosses the border into America and hires Chris Adams (George Kennedy), a mercenary of considerable skill, who uses the rest of the cash on more hired guns. After the team is rounded out by experts on close-combat fighting, explosives and knife-throwing, they set off to free Quintero.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: Erstwhile gunslinger Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) has put his rowdy days behind him, settling down with a wife (Mariette Hartley) and serving as the sheriff of his town in the Arizona territory. So when his old pal Jim Mackay (Ralph Waite) asks for help defending the border town of Magdalena, Mexico, from a marauding bandit named De Toro, Chris refuses. It's only after De Toro's gang kidnaps Chris's wife that he changes his mind, enlisting a cutthroat gang of prisoners to help him.

programme.title: Posse
programme.desc: In Cuba, a band of Buffalo Soldiers, led by the intrepid Jesse Lee (Mario Van Peebles) and joined by a gambling white soldier (Stephen Baldwin), is sent on a suicide mission to intercept a shipment of gold from enemy troops during the Spanish-American War. When they discover that the racist white officer who sent them, Col. Graham (Billy Zane), meant to betray them, they are forced to shoot their way to freedom. Upon escaping, they embark on a dangerous quest across the American frontier.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: Matthew Quigley (Tom Selleck) is an American rifleman who travels to the Australian outback to answer a help wanted ad calling for a sharpshooter. When Quigley meets his employer, Elliot Marston (Alan Rickman), he's appalled to discover the job involves killing Aborigines. The two men fight, and when Quigley is knocked out, Marston leaves him and a local crazy woman (Laura San Giacomo) to die in a remote part of the outback. They're rescued, however, by Aborigines, and plot their revenge.

programme.title: Man of the East
programme.desc: A dude (Terence Hill) arrives from New England with books and a bicycle, ready to claim his father's rowdy ranch.

programme.title: Bandera Bandits
programme.desc: A lawman (Telly Savalas) is determined to catch a pair of ruthless criminals (Tomas Milian, Susan George) as they rob their way across Mexico.

programme.title: God Forgives, I Don't
programme.desc: Psychotic bandit Bill San Antonio (Frank Wolff) kills all the passengers on a train and steals a fortune in gold. Hutch Bessy (Bud Spencer), an insurance investigator, and his gunslinger partner, Cat Stevens (Terence Hill), go on the hunt for Bill, hoping to retrieve the loot. Unfortunately, outlaws take Hutch and Cat prisoner. Cat manages to get away and saves Hutch's life. When Cat is kidnapped later by other crooks, Hutch has to reciprocate. But they still have Bill to worry about.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: From worse to terrible -- Civil War veteran Matt Weaver (George Segal) arrives in New Mexico worn down from combat, only to discover his family plot has been requisitioned and sold by cutthroat property developer Sam Brewster. When Weaver attempts to reclaim his land, Brewster hires a reclusive gunman (Yul Brynner) to take him out. However, the gunman proves uncontrollable. He refuses to kill Weaver and instead tries to seduce his wife (Janice Rule), all the while wreaking havoc throughout town.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: Set during the Civil War, Colonel John Marlowe leads a Union Calvary brigade on a mission behind Confederate lines to destroy enemy railroads and supplies. The colonel is confronted with numerous challenges before reaching Union held Baton Rouge.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: In 1836, the Mexican army, led by General Santa Anna, is invading Texas. Hoping to create a diversion for Santa Anna's forces, General Sam Houston (Richard Boone) orders Colonel William B. Travis (Laurence Harvey), joined by Colonels Jim Bowie (Richard Widmark) and Davy Crockett (John Wayne), to lead a small, heroic band of American and Texican fighters in a resistance battle at the Alamo mission. The carnage at the Alamo further spurs the Republic of Texas toward freedom.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics race to a skydiver who's suffered serious injuries after crashing into a house. And there's a race across the country to reach a man who's fallen 40 feet from a ladder. (S3 Ep9) [AD,S]

programme.title: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: A bounty hunter heads to the Amazon to square a debt and teams up with a bad guy in the search for treasure.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom face alien threats and a relentless soldier, forcing them to make a life-altering choice.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: What if a child from another world crash landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

programme.title: The Retirement Plan
programme.desc: Ashley's ties with the wrong people endanger her family, prompting her to seek help from her estranged father, who lives a quiet retired life in the Cayman Islands.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: Armored truck security guards are trapped in a deadly robbery plot, forcing them to choose between greed and survival amid rising danger.

programme.title: A-X-L
programme.desc: Family adventure. The life of a teenage boy is forever altered by a chance encounter with cutting edge military technology.

programme.title: When A Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A high school student's babysitting job takes a nightmarish turn when a series of phone calls from a stranger insist that she 'check the children'.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer through a series of outrageous tests to prove his theories about relationships.

programme.title: Battle Los Angeles
programme.desc: Facing a catastrophic global invasion, a determined squadron of U.S. Marines steps forward, embodying humanity's final hope against overwhelming extraterrestrial forces.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven, driven by vengeance and shaped by his father's cruelty, becomes the world's most feared hunter. His journey blurs the line between justice and obsession as he seeks redemption.

programme.title: The Mitchells Vs The Machines
programme.desc: The Mitchells, a quirky, dysfunctional family, must put aside their differences and fight a robot apocalypse during their long-awaited road trip, all while trying to save humanity.

programme.title: Men In Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to MIB's early days in 1969 to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: A shrewd young man and a masterful treasure hunter put aside their differences to find a lost ancient fortune dating back 500 years.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: An undisciplined boy must learn Drunken Fist Kung Fu in order to stop an assassin.Star: Jackie Chan

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary crew travelling through the Amazon picks up a stranded man whose hobby is to capture the giant Anaconda snake.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The original Ghostbusters reunite with a new team to battle a powerful, death-chilling god threatening the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker grapples with his dual identity as a teenager and the burgeoning superhero, Spider-Man, balancing the extraordinary with the ordinary challenges of youth.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Detectives Mike and Marcus uncover a drug lord's plan to control Miami.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Denzel Washington, Marton Csokas, Chloe Grace Moretz. A former Black Ops commando fakes his own death in hopes of living out a quiet life.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: A super-soldier resurrected with advanced nanotech seeks revenge and uncovers secrets about his past in this action-packed thriller.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel goes awry, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: Officer K of the LAPD discovers a dangerous secret and embarks on a mission to find a missing former blade runner who vanished over thirty years ago, risking everything to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Meatballs
programme.desc: A scientist tries to solve world hunger only to see things go awry as food falls from the sky in abundance.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett join the Miami Police Department's special team AMMO to bring down the ruthless Armando, who is on a mission to kill Mike at his mother Isabel's orders.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: During WWII, Angus finds a mysterious egg that hatches a water horse. He protects the growing creature from soldiers and danger, forming a deep bond in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: The most glamorous private eyes are sent into action when electronics genius Eric Knox is kidnapped.

programme.title: The Unholy
programme.desc: The Unholy is a supernatural horror about a deaf girl who, after a visit from a spirit she believes to be the Virgin Mary, suddenly speaks and heals others, but dark, sinister forces are at play.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Terrorists attempt to kidnap a wealthy child. Their plan is foiled when a deadly black mamba is sent instead of a harmless snake.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the International Space Station finds a rapidly evolving life form that caused extinction on Mars, and now threatens the crew and all life on Earth.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Captain Artemis and her soldiers are pulled into a world where dangerous monsters and humans co-exist. They must escape with the help from a hunter.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride Or Die
programme.desc: Miami detectives, defying protocol, investigate their captain's murder, uncovering a dangerous conspiracy of corruption and cartel involvement, seeking justice and vindication.

programme.title: The Pope'S Exorcist
programme.desc: Glimpses of the events that exorcist father Gabriele Amorth's experiences while assisting a possessed child and revealing a conspiracy that has been kept secret within the Vatican for years.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Driven by a rare blood disorder, Dr. Morbius takes a desperate risk to save others, unknowingly unleashing a dark force within himself.

programme.desc: Don meets up with an old friend; Pete's personal life presents problems; Joan brings her boyfriend to the office.

programme.desc: Duck offers Pete a promotion, Betty has a dangerous liaison after receiving some unwanted news, and Don returns.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don accidentally learns a secret about Salvatore during a business trip to Baltimore; Back at the office, the firings continue, but the new management appoints Peter and Ken as new co-heads of accounts.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Betty's father visits; Sterling Cooper handles a very specific client request; Roger makes wedding arrangements; Peggy is affected personally by a campaign.

programme.title: Mad Men

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don has reservations about a misguided potential client who wants to sell jai alai as the "new national pastime"; Betty's father passes away.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Betty has hallucinations of her dead father as she delivers her baby; Peggy begins to question her future at Sterling Cooper.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: The new British bosses want the staff to come in to meet their dashing new blade Guy MacKendrick; Joan tenders her resignation only to find that she has been too rash.

programme.desc: BlackBerry hits the market; Mike and Jim try to avoid a hostile takeover; Jim strategizes to increase sales.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: Apple announces the iPhone; Mike scrambles to please Verizon; Jim is unreachable trying to make a personal business deal; the Securities and Exchange Commission investigates the company.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs
programme.desc: In 2003 Zoe Jacobs disappeared during her 21st birthday party; many believe Zoe ran away, but others suspect she was murdered; when police officer Sam Kahlil discovers Zoe's backpack, Detective James Cormack is called in to investigate.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs
programme.desc: New evidence gives Nadja and Sam hope that Zoe is still alive, but as Cormack puts together a timeline of Zoe's disappearance, the old theory that Zoe drove to Brisbane doesn't add up.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs
programme.desc: Cormack invites Sam to examine the contents of Zoe's backpack and probe her memory for clues; re-examining CCTV footage from the night she disappeared, he discovers Zoe actually drove to Xanadu, the rural property where Joseph was living.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs
programme.desc: A tragic discovery sends shock waves through the community, particularly for those clinging to hope that Zoe was still alive; Sam's anonymous phone calls are officially traced; Cormack turns his attention to Joseph.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs
programme.desc: The field of suspects narrows; Sean's computer reveals a history of despicable behavior towards women, including the photos taken of Zoe without her consent.

programme.title: Black Snow: Jack of Clubs

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Venice
programme.desc: To get his dog back, private eye Steve Ford forges an unlikely alliance with Spyder, the leader of a local gang. With help from his best friend, Steve pulls out the big guns to retrieve Spyder's missing cash and cocaine and save his beloved pooch.","large":"Steve Ford is a private detective in Venice Beach, Calif., who's good with the ladies, bad with the punches and wild about his dog Buddy. When local thugs steal Buddy, Ford turns to Spyder, their devious leader, and forges an unlikely alliance. With help from his best friend, Steve pulls out the big guns to retrieve Spyder's stolen cash and cocaine and save Buddy.

programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Michelle Monaghan) helps an ex-convict (Stephen Dorff) after a planned murder goes wrong.

programme.desc: As Don secures an account with Conrad Hilton, Sterling and Cooper try to strong-arm Don into signing a contract; Betty meets with her acquaintance from the governor's office.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don and Betty renew their love affair while on a business trip to Rome; Peter has a bout of infidelity with an au pair in his building while his wife is away.

programme.title: Mad Men

programme.desc: A family faces tough times and strained relationships, but the determined leading lady steps up to bring everyone back together and heal their bonds.

programme.title: Phool Bane Angaray
programme.desc: After her husband is murdered, a determined wife joins the police force, seeking justice and vengeance. She dives into a thrilling journey filled with danger and unexpected twists.

programme.title: Police Aur Mujrim
programme.desc: A gangster is out for blood after his henchmen get locked up by the police. Fueled by vengeance, he's determined to make them pay for their betrayal.

programme.title: Surya The Soldier
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Arjun Sarja. Surya's temper costs him his dream army post. Now, only a psychologist's approval stands between him and redemption. Can discipline and healing lead him back to the battlefield?

programme.title: Skanda
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Pothineni,Sreeleela. Renowned for martial arts, a young man is recruited by a secret agency. His mission: confront terrorists, face danger, and fight bravely to safeguard peace and innocent lives.

programme.title: Gangaajal
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgan,Gracy Singh. Amit Kumar enters a crime-infested town with a clean heart. But with crooked cops and wicked politicians in his way, justice might need more than just a badge.

programme.title: Tamilarasan
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay Antony,Suresh Gopi. Disgruntled cop seizes hospital control due to son's neglect and conflict ensues when he rejects a direct order from his senior officer.

programme.title: Vedha
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Ganavi Laxman. Vedha and his daughter Kanaka are on a killing spree. They are being chased by a cop Rama, but they always manage to escape in the nick of time. Can Rama stop the killings?

programme.title: Pakka Commercial
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Raashii Khanna. In a legal rollercoaster, Judge Suryanarayana quits after failing to serve justice. His wily son, Lucky, takes center stage, exposing a criminal's hidden sins.

programme.title: Aranmanai 4
programme.desc: Starring: Sundar C,Tamannaah Bhatia. Daniel's quest to uncover his sister's death spirals into a nightmare, revealing sinister truths and igniting a chain of terror that changes him forever.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ji Ghar Par Hain Fun On The Run
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ji Ghar Par Hain Fun On The Run

programme.title: Crew
programme.desc: Starring: Tabu,Kareena Kapoor. Three flight attendants resort to gold smuggling to save their careers after their airline faces bankruptcy, leading to risky choices and life-threatening consequences.

programme.title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Pooja Hegde. Bhaijaan won marry to keep family peace. His brothers secretly spark romance, leading to funny twists, heartfelt moments, and unexpected love.

programme.title: Jawan
programme.desc: Starring: Shah Rukh Khan,Nayanthara. A prison warden recruits inmates to commit outrageous crimes, exposing corruption and injustice, ultimately leading to an unexpected and life-changing reunion.

programme.title: Heropanti 2
programme.desc: Starring: Tiger Shroff,Nawazuddin Siddiqui. RJ's arrival in Inaaya and Laila's glittering world turns perilous. Inaaya believes RJ is her former lover, sparking chaos, betrayal, and a storm of cybercrime and action.

programme.title: Bhajarangi 2
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Shruthi. A forest officer uncovers drug baron Araka's scheme: exploiting villagers for drug production. Driven, the officer resolves to halt the operation.

programme.title: International Rowdy
programme.desc: Starring: Vikram,Nayanthara. A man named Love invents a powerful drug, aiming to sell it to terrorists and causing widespread harm. Indian RAW agent Akhilan halts his plans.

programme.title: Bro
programme.desc: Starring: Pawan Kalyan,Sai Dharam Tej. Given three months to fix his life, a self-centered man is guided by Time itself. Through laughs and challenges, he learns family, love, and redemption before fate calls again.

programme.title: Arya - Ek Deewana
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Anuradha Mehta. Childhood friends Ajay and Arya, now on different paths, reunite and vie for the same woman's love, unraveling buried secrets.

programme.title: Geeta Govinda
programme.desc: Starring: Deverakonda, Rashmika Mandanna. An innocent young lecturer is misunderstood as a pervert and despised by a woman who co-incidentally turns out to be the younger sister of his brother-in-law.

programme.title: Saamy 2
programme.desc: Starring: Vikram,Keerthy Suresh. Ramasaamy, a receptionist for Minister Viswanathan, dreams big. After saving Viswanathan's daughter from gangsters, he earns her love and begins chasing his civil service ambitions.

programme.title: Shivam Bhaje
programme.desc: Starring: Ashwin Babu,Digangana Suryavanshi. A loan agent sees crime visions after an accident. He uncovers a plot to harm India and a serial killer. He must solve the mystery and stop the disaster.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Ameesha Patel. When Tara Singh goes missing during a skirmish and is believed to be captured in Pakistan, his son Jeete sets out to rescue him and enters a labyrinth from which they both must escape at all costs.

programme.title: Power Play
programme.desc: Starring: Raj Tarun,Hemal Ingle. Vijay, a young man, convinces his family to let him marry Keerthy. However, their wedding plans are jeopardised when he is accused of a scam.

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: Starring: Utkarsh Sharma,Ishita Chauhan. An orphan RAW officer loses his team on a deadly mission and begins a relentless hunt for their killers, believing justice and revenge are the only ways to heal.

programme.title: Dunki
programme.desc: Starring: Shah Rukh Khan,Taapsee Pannu. Dreaming of a better life, friends take the illegal 'donkey flight' to the UK. Their road is wild, dangerous, and full of choices that could change everything-or end it all.

programme.title: Aravind Sametha
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr,Pooja Hegde. A young scion from a violent lineage seeks redemption, ending bloodshed and embarking on a journey of self-discovery and transformation.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Starring: Jeet,Biswajit Chakraborty. Raja is hired to shoot a party leader but is instructed not to kill him. When the politician ends up getting killed by an unknown assassin, Raja becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Rudrangi
programme.desc: Starring: Jagapati Babu,Mamta Mohandas. Tyrant Bheem Rao wants Rudrangi, and he'll crush anyone in his path. As her village suffers, Rudrangi's quiet strength becomes the spark for resistance.

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Starring: R. Sarathkumar,Vijay Kanishka. A demonic mask man is torturing a middle class family that practices Ahimsa and uses Vijay to unleash his satanic thoughts. Vijay avenges the mask man rivals.

programme.title: Batwara (1989)
programme.desc: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between aristocrat Vikram and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

programme.title: Inteqam
programme.desc: A tragic chain of events leads to revenge, mistaken identities, and unexpected friendships in a tale of heartbreak and resilience.

programme.title: Chandan Ka Palna
programme.desc: Ajit suit acknowledges that his life after marriage is complete. He and his mother's bizarre behavior soon starts,which tend to disturb their relations.

programme.title: Mere Bhaiya
programme.desc: A girl tries to reconcile her father and her brother, because she loves both very much. She tries to reform her brother by making sacrifices, which shakes his core.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: A multi-generational drama showing daughters' struggles, family loyalty, and societal expectations in a rural setup.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Jagadhatri
programme.desc: After an evening of recitation and song, Shreemoti and Rajiv discover four friends dead. Panicked, Shreemoti calls Swayambhu, who arrives and questions Rajiv, farmhouse owner, about the tragedy.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.
